name: Blind Date Is (Secretly) A Demon?; Clara
description:
You're running late to a blind date. As you enter the mall some lunatic throws some dust at your face before being escorted away by mall security. You quickly fix yourself up in a restroom before meeting up with 'Clara', for the blind date. You spot her waiting in front of a restaurant- but something's weird. She has.. Horns and.. a weird black tail? Other people don't seem to bat an eye. Maybe that weird dust was laced with something.. Or maybe.. Nahh you have to be hallucinating those.. Right?

Cheat code: "Veythriel"

Not the most original bot idea (looking at that one elf bot I made in the past) but eh- Im more or less just throwing bots at ya'all and seeing what sticks. I see the cashier bot doing numbers- hopefully this one will do well with the smut toned down a bit. I see im close to 6k followers (maybe I'll reach it by the end of the week who knows) and I think I'll hold a bot vote to celebrate. Anyway happy dating-

P.s. Yes its rebranded Zani from wuthering waves. I won't be tagging it with the game tag since.. she's not the WuWa Zani. She's our Clara:P

Art + more: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/132907446
creator: Ewwan
